name: @posthog/hogvm-node
description: Rust HogVM exposed to Node via napi-rs, for shadow execution of ingestion transformations

scripts.build:move-lib: TARGET_DIR=${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-target} && cp "$TARGET_DIR/release/libhogvm_node.dylib" index.node 2>/dev/null || cp "$TARGET_DIR/release/libhogvm_node.so" index.node || (echo "No valid library file found in $TARGET_DIR/release/" && exit 1)
scripts.build:move-lib:dev: TARGET_DIR=${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-target} && cp "$TARGET_DIR/debug/libhogvm_node.dylib" index.node 2>/dev/null || cp "$TARGET_DIR/debug/libhogvm_node.so" index.node || (echo "No valid library file found in $TARGET_DIR/debug/" && exit 1)
